title: 聖蹄祭の、密やかな苦悩

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text:
Welcome back, Trainer!
Greetings, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Guests
text_block_list.text: Yaaaay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Solefall Faire has come again, and this year's
centerpiece is the Umamusume Cafe. With a long
line of customers eagerly waiting outside the
doors, all appears well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But this wasn't the case a few hours earlier, where
a portentous mood filled the student council
office...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I've found a store in the city that sells butler
costumes.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But the earliest time they can deliver them is
midday. It won't make it in time for opening.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Understood. I appreciate your swift handling of
this. Midday... Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry. It's my fault for not paying closer
attention...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
This is but a mishap—nothing to take personally.
No one could've predicted our box of costumes
would be collected with the garbage.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Still... we need to find a solution. We can't sell the
idea of a butler cafe with no uniforms.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We've run out of time though. We'll have to cut
the morning service...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Silence envelops the office. Until...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! What an unforeseen predicament
to have befallen you, good friends!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But my dashing looks will hardly lose their luster
from the absence of a costume! It is an
irrelevance!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I am who the visitors are after!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Please, you can't cancel the cafe! Everyone's
looking forward to it!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: "I am who the visitors are after," you say...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh, I might have an idea! How about this?

text_block_list.name: Guest A
text_block_list.text:
I had my doubts when I heard the concept was
changing to give customers a taste of what it's
like to be a trainer...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Please, enjoy this aromatic blend before you take
to your desk, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry to disturb you while you eat. But what
should we work on today?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Huh, you've seen all my races?! That's dedication!
Thanks a bunch!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I mean! Um... Of course you came to all my races.
You're my trainer!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You want a photo? You need not even ask! A
shame it would be if my beautiful visage were not
recorded for posterity!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, let us go and find a window flooded in the
sun's radiance!

text_block_list.name: Guest A
text_block_list.text: But this works really well!

text_block_list.name: Guest B
text_block_list.text:
And the butler cafe hasn't been shelved. That's
going to start in the afternoon! I've got to come
again!

text_block_list.name: Guest A
text_block_list.text: Wait, but aren't all the spots booked already?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Don't you worry! We've made sure to add
additional seating, so there's still spots available.
Would you like to make a reservation?

text_block_list.name: Guest A
text_block_list.text: Y-yes, please!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! I'll be waiting for you this afternoon.
The next time you see me, I'll be in proper butler
attire!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...I hope you'll be delighted, my lady.

text_block_list.name: Guests
text_block_list.text: Kyaaaa!
